name: Workers' Comp Attorney Fees in Idaho

mainEntity.name: How much does a workers' comp lawyer cost in Boise for workplace injury?
mainEntity.text: How much does a workers' comp lawyer cost in Boise for workplace injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most Boise workers' comp attorneys work on contingency: 20-25% of settlement, no upfront fees.

suggestedAnswer.text: Idaho standard 20% first $25K, 15% next, etc., approved by Commission. Free consults common. Lawyers increase settlements 2-3x by fighting denials; worth it for denied claims in West Valley City.

description: Most Boise workers' comp attorneys work on contingency: 20-25% of settlement, no upfront fees.
